title: Tameable Slimes
description: A Mcreator made mod that makes Slimes tameable
body:
**Bugs Can Be Reported** at the [Github Page](https://github.com/Spiderman31807/Tameable/issues) (All Known Issues will also be Listed there as well)

**A Mcreator made mod**, that adds a Modded Entity called "Slime" perfectly mimic the Vanilla versions.

Whenever a **Vanilla Slime spawns** it'll have a **chance to be immediately replaced** with the **tameable variant** within a tick. (**chance is 66%** by default, gamerule is available)

You can **tame these Slimes by feeding them any Slime Item/Block** however since they dont tame while they have a target, there is a second way..

When a Slime is killed it'll have a **chance to drop Living Slimeball** (**chance is 15%** by default, gamerule is available), you can **craft a Living Slime Block using 9 Living Slimeballs in a Slime Mixer**.

When you place a **Living Slime Block** it'll immediately break and **spawn a Tamed Slime** with the Owner of whoever placed the Block.

**Slime Mixer Recipe**.

**![Slime Mixer Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1104097/description_85f02e74-1f92-4784-b624-8b722b2610bd.png)**

### Interaction Guide

*   **Empty Hand:** will toggle Follow mode.
*   **Any Slime Item/Block:** heals the Slime.
*   **Glass Bottle:** can be used every 5 mintues to collect slime.
*   **Water Bottle:** will remove any Color from the Slime.
*   **Dye:** will chance the color of the Slime to the Dye (if already dyed then mix the two Dyes using RGB)

**Follow Mode:** 

*   **Disabled:** will stay within 10 blocks of the area it was disabled at.
*   **Enabled:** will stay within 10 blocks of the Owner.

Supported Languages
-------------------

*   tr\_tr, Turkish (Turkey)
*   uk\_ua, Ukrainian (Ukraine)
*   zh\_cn, Chinese Simplified
*   zh\_tw, Chinese Traditional
*   nb\_sj, Norwegian Bokmål (Norway)
*   nl\_nl, Dutch (Netherlands)
*   pl\_pl, Polish (Poland)
*   pt\_br, Portuguese (Brazil)
*   pt\_pt, Portuguese (Portugal)
*   ru\_ru, Russian (Russia)
*   sk\_sk, Slovak (Slovakia)
*   sv\_se, Swedish (Sweden)
*   es\_mx, Spanish (Mexico)
*   fi\_fi, Finnish (Finland)
*   fr\_ca, French (Canada)
*   fr\_fr, French (France)
*   hu\_hu, Hungarian (Hungary)
*   id\_id, Indonesian (Indonesia)
*   it\_it, Italian (Italy)
*   ja\_jp, Japanese (Japan)
*   ko\_kr, Korean (Korea)
*   cs\_cz, Czech
*   da\_dk, Danish
*   el\_cy, Greek
*   en\_gb, English (United Kingdom)
*   en\_us, English (United States)
*   es\_es, Spanish (Spain)
*   bg\_bg, Bulgarian
